title: MD
biography: Sidney Farber was an American pediatric pathologist who is considered the father of modern chemotherapy. He achieved the first remissions in childhood leukemia using aminopterin in 1948.
aiSummary: Sidney Farber is a pathology specialist at Children's Hospital Boston. Based in Boston.

timeline.title: First chemotherapy remission
timeline.description: Achieved first remissions in childhood leukemia using aminopterin, launching the era of cancer chemotherapy

timeline.title: Founded cancer philanthropy
timeline.description: Co-founded the Children's Cancer Research Foundation, later the Dana-Farber Cancer Institute
